title: Generate JSON Data for a Real Estate Platform
scenario: Develop a prompt that generates JSON data for a real estate platform that includes properties with multiple features, amenities, and photos. The JSON output should be under 1000 characters and include at least 5 properties with their respective features, amenities, and photos. The prompt should be concise and clear.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for properties and features

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated property data, including features, amenities, and photos.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 5 properties with their respective features, amenities, and photos.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
